chunks.text: Max Willsey | EECS at UC Berkeley Max Willsey: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo Max Willsey Assistant Professor Contact Information 725 Soda Hall mwillsey@berkeley.edu Links Personal Homepage Research Support Eva Leach eva.leach@berkeley.edu Biography Max Willsey joined UC Berkeley EECS in 2024 as an Assistant Professor. His research connects programming languages, databases, and formal methods to make it easier to build state-of-the-art program optimizers, synthesizers, and verifiers. He leads the development of the egg toolkit used by many research groups and companies, leading to several publications and two Distinguished Paper awards. Education 2021, PhD, Computer Science, University of Washington Research Areas Programming Systems (PS) Teaching Schedule CS 263. Design of Programming Languages , TuTh 14:00-15:29, Soda 310
